steps.title: Apply the no-solution condition
steps.content: Rewrite both as $16x-26y=8$ and $-8x+ty=\tfrac{1}{5}$. For no solution, the coefficients of $x$ and $y$ must be proportional: $$\frac{-8}{16}=\frac{t}{-26}.$$

steps.title: Solve for the parameter
steps.content: Cross-multiplying gives $16t=208$, so $t=13$. The constant terms differ, confirming no solution. The answer is 13.
